nodes.label: 11th Wave US-Israel Strikes
nodes.summary: US and Israel launched the 11th wave of strikes targeting IRGC headquarters and missile sites in Tehran on March 5, 2026, with total targets estimated near 2,000.

props.content: US/Israel launched the '11th wave' of strikes this evening, targeting IRGC headquarters and missile sites in Tehran. Total destroyed targets now estimated near 2,000.

nodes.label: Iranian Navy Status
nodes.summary: The Iranian Navy is effectively non-functional following the loss of over 20 vessels during conflict operations.

props.content: Iranian Navy is effectively non-functional after the loss of 20+ vessels.

nodes.label: Ukraine Peace Talks Postponement
nodes.summary: US-brokered trilateral peace talks between Ukraine and Russia have been postponed indefinitely due to the ongoing war in Iran.

props.content: Zelensky confirmed that US-brokered trilateral talks with Russia, originally set for this week, are postponed 'for a while' due to the Iran war.

nodes.label: Kristi Noem DHS Removal
nodes.summary: President Trump fired Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem following a dispute over a $200M ad campaign, naming Senator Markwayne Mullin as her replacement.

props.content: President Trump fired Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem, naming Senator Markwayne Mullin as her replacement following a public dispute over a $200M ad campaign.

nodes.label: Arab FMs Emergency Meeting
nodes.summary: Arab Foreign Ministers are scheduled to hold an emergency meeting this Sunday to discuss regional instability and post-Khamenei scenarios.

props.content: Arab Foreign Ministers will hold an emergency meeting this Sunday. Expected focus: gaming post-Khamenei scenarios and managing regional instability.

nodes.label: CMC Leadership Purge
nodes.summary: Five of six military generals on China's Central Military Commission have been removed, leaving only Xi Jinping and Zhang Shengmin.

props.content: Analysis confirms 5 of 6 military generals appointed by Xi to the Central Military Commission (CMC) have now been removed, leaving only discipline chief Zhang Shengmin alongside Xi.

nodes.label: Iran Regime Fall Prediction
nodes.summary: Prediction that the Iranian regime will fall by June 30, 2026; market price increased to 38 cents.

props.statement: The Iranian regime will fall by June 30, 2026.

nodes.label: China Taiwan Invasion Prediction
nodes.summary: Prediction that China will invade Taiwan in 2027; market price remains flat at 11 cents.

nodes.label: United Russia Election Prediction
nodes.summary: Prediction that United Russia will win the most seats in the upcoming election; market price increased to 78 cents.

props.statement: United Russia will win the most seats in the election.

nodes.label: Tim Cook Departure Prediction
nodes.summary: Prediction that Tim Cook will leave Apple in 2026; market price dropped significantly to 28 cents.

props.statement: Tim Cook will be out as Apple CEO in 2026.

nodes.label: CMC Command Vacuum
nodes.summary: A 71% vacancy in the Central Military Commission command structure serves as a significant operational barrier to military action.

props.description: CMC command vacuum (71% vacancy) is a hard operational barrier.

nodes.label: Russian Digital Suppression
nodes.summary: Pre-election suppression in Russia includes bans on WhatsApp and Telegram to solidify political control.

nodes.label: IRGC-Larijani Succession Tension
nodes.summary: Tension between the IRGC and Larijani regarding succession increases the risk of chaos in Iran.

props.content: IRGC-Larijani succession tension increases chaos risk.

nodes.label: Macbook Neo Success
nodes.summary: The success of the Macbook Neo and Tim Cook's active leadership make his departure from Apple unlikely.

props.content: Macbook Neo success + active product leadership makes departure unlikely.
